reviews.comment:
Saqué turno por la App para hacerle el Service a la Amarok.
Cuando llegué al turno me dijeron que la camilla no era apta para hacer el trabajo, nunca me avisaron ni me cancelaron el turno.
No tiene sentido ofrecer un servicio que no pueden brindar, y encima no te avisan ni cancelan el turno.
Una pérdida de tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
I booked an appointment through the app to get my Amarok serviced.
When I arrived, they told me the service table wasn't suitable for the job. They never notified me or canceled my appointment.
It makes no sense to offer a service you can't provide, and then not even bother to notify you or cancel your appointment.
A complete waste of time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKdU1UVkVBEAE
